creator: gcooper@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at SUSv4, the only item of value in this patch now is
_POSIX_AIO_LISTIO_MAX:

{_POSIX_AIO_LISTIO_MAX}
    The number of I/O operations that can be specified in a list I/O call.
    Value: 2

    All other values listed conform 100% to SUSv4. The attached patch
corrects that.
Thanks,
-Garrett
